next_steps: 24-hour urine collection for total protein quantification
Serologic evaluation (ANA, anti-PLA2R antibodies, C3/C4 complement levels, anti-dsDNA)
Initiation of ACE inhibitor or ARB for proteinuria and blood pressure management
Evaluation for secondary causes of nephrotic syndrome including viral serologies and malignancy screening
Consideration of prophylactic anticoagulation if serum albumin remains very low
